_comment: Default deck-agnostic opponent pool for intermediate self-play (2026-06-29). Each Kaggle agent pilots its OWN deck (agent/kaggle_agents/<name>_deck.csv); add an archetype by dropping a vendored module + sibling deck here and adding a line — a config change, not a code change. 'self' + past checkpoints are added by the trainer, not listed here. Breadth across archetypes robustifies the trainee whichever deck it pilots (Metal control, Dragon spread, Fighting/Lucario).
